name: standard_weather_dispatch
description: Standard weather query dispatched through A2A to Weather Agent

input.query: 北京明天天气如何，适合出门吗

name: weather_dispatch_with_cancel
description: Dispatch then immediate cancel — verify CANCELLED state

name: weather_dispatch_idempotent
description: Duplicate submission with same idempotency key
assertions: both submissions return the same runId
task list contains exactly one run for the idempotency key
